creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 170885
misc_nms_0_2_0

Add binary sneakers that recreates almost identically the movie part.

- Add PORTEPOCH for using github release version
  nms-0.2.0 < nms-20160429
- add manually pkg-plist
- portlint compliant
- poudriere tests ok
